subject: [PATCH 1/8] mm/memory-tiers: consolidate memory type dedup into mt_get_memory_type()

2026-03-21.patch_summary: This patch consolidates memory type deduplication into a single function, mt_get_memory_type(), which checks against the global default_memory_types list under memory_tier_lock. The per-driver lists and associated infrastructure are removed as they only provided deduplication within a single driver. A new constant, MEMTIER_DEFAULT_LOWTIER_ADISTANCE, is introduced to replace the default DAX adistance, making it clearer where other drivers should place their memory in relation to the default lower tier.
